options.content:
- Use Cases: This dashboard shows Plane project management metrics across all synced issue types.
- Data Source Required: Plane
- Metrics: Issue throughput, lead time, estimate points, cycle progress, assignee breakdown, and type breakdown.
- Cycle-based panels use Plane cycles only. Work items without a cycle appear under **No Cycle**.
- Use the **Issue Type** variable to filter throughput, lead-time, and assignee panels. Type-breakdown and cycle panels stay unfiltered for parity with the Taiga experience.
- Estimate panels use Plane work item `estimate_point` values only; epic estimates are intentionally excluded to avoid double-counting.

panels.title: Dashboard Introduction
1. Issue Throughput

panels.description: Total number of non-cancelled issues created in the selected time range and board.

targets.rawSql:
select
  count(distinct i.id) as value
from issues i
  join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
where
  COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) in (${plane_type})
  and $__timeFilter(i.created_date)
  and i.status <> 'CANCELLED'
  and bi.board_id in (${plane_board_id})

panels.title: Number of Issues [Created in Selected Time Range]

panels.description: Total number of issues whose resolution date falls within the selected time range (i.e. completed during this period).

targets.rawSql:
select
  count(distinct i.id) as value
from issues i
  join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
where
  COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) in (${plane_type})
  and i.status = 'DONE'
  and $__timeFilter(i.resolution_date)
  and bi.board_id in (${plane_board_id})

panels.title: Number of Closed Issues [Resolved in Selected Time Range]

panels.description: Current open vs. closed status of issues, grouped by creation month. Cancelled issues are excluded.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_ADD(date(i.created_date), INTERVAL -DAYOFMONTH(date(i.created_date))+1 DAY) as time,
  count(distinct case when i.status in ('TODO', 'IN_PROGRESS') then i.id else null end) as "Number of Open Issues",
  count(distinct case when i.status = 'DONE' then i.id else null end) as "Number of Closed Issues"
FROM issues i
  join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
where
  COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) in (${plane_type})
  and $__timeFilter(i.created_date)
  and i.status <> 'CANCELLED'
  and bi.board_id in (${plane_board_id})
group by 1

panels.title: Open vs Closed Issues by Creation Month

panels.description: Issue delivery rate for non-cancelled issues created in the selected time range. Formula: done issues / non-cancelled issues created in range. Note: this metric counts by creation date, not resolution date.

targets.rawSql:
with _requirements as(
  select
    count(distinct case when i.status <> 'CANCELLED' then i.id else null end) as total_count,
    count(distinct case when i.status = 'DONE' then i.id else null end) as delivered_count
  from issues i
    join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
  where
    COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) in (${plane_type})
    and $__timeFilter(i.created_date)
    and bi.board_id in (${plane_board_id})
)

select
  now() as time,
  coalesce(1.0 * delivered_count/nullif(total_count, 0), 0) as requirement_delivery_rate
from _requirements

panels.title: Issue Delivery Rate [Created in Selected Time Range]

panels.description: Monthly delivery rate for issues created in each month of the selected time range. Cancelled issues are excluded.

targets.rawSql:
with _requirements as(
  select
    DATE_ADD(date(i.created_date), INTERVAL -DAYOFMONTH(date(i.created_date))+1 DAY) as time,
    coalesce(
      1.0 * count(distinct case when i.status = 'DONE' then i.id else null end)
      / nullif(count(distinct case when i.status <> 'CANCELLED' then i.id else null end), 0),
      0
    ) as delivered_rate
  from issues i
    join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
  where
    COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) in (${plane_type})
    and $__timeFilter(i.created_date)
    and bi.board_id in (${plane_board_id})
  group by 1
)

select
  time,
  delivered_rate
from _requirements
order by time

panels.title: Issue Delivery Rate by Creation Month
2. Issue Lead Time

panels.description: Average number of days from story creation to resolution.

targets.rawSql:
select
  avg(COALESCE(i.lead_time_minutes, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, i.created_date, i.resolution_date))/1440) as value
from issues i
  join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
where
  COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) in (${plane_type})
  and i.status = 'DONE'
  and $__timeFilter(i.resolution_date)
  and bi.board_id in (${plane_board_id})

panels.title: Mean Lead Time in Days [Resolved in Selected Time Range]

panels.description: 80% of stories are resolved within this many days.

targets.rawSql:
with _ranks as(
  select
    COALESCE(i.lead_time_minutes, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, i.created_date, i.resolution_date)) as lead_time_minutes,
    percent_rank() over (order by COALESCE(i.lead_time_minutes, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, i.created_date, i.resolution_date)) asc) as ranks
  from issues i
    join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
  where
    COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) in (${plane_type})
    and i.status = 'DONE'
    and $__timeFilter(i.resolution_date)
    and bi.board_id in (${plane_board_id})
)

select
  max(lead_time_minutes/1440) as value
from _ranks
where
  ranks <= 0.8

panels.title: 80% Issues' Lead Time ≤ # Days [Resolved in Selected Time Range]

panels.description: Mean lead time per month for resolved stories.

targets.rawSql:
with _requirements as(
  select
    DATE_ADD(date(i.resolution_date), INTERVAL -DAYOFMONTH(date(i.resolution_date))+1 DAY) as time,
    avg(COALESCE(i.lead_time_minutes, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, i.created_date, i.resolution_date))/1440) as mean_lead_time
  from issues i
    join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
  where
    COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) in (${plane_type})
    and i.status = 'DONE'
    and $__timeFilter(i.resolution_date)
    and bi.board_id in (${plane_board_id})
  group by 1
)

select
  date_format(time,'%M %Y') as month,
  mean_lead_time
from _requirements
order by time asc

panels.title: Mean Lead Time by Month [Resolved in Selected Time Range]

panels.description: The cumulative distribution of story lead time. Each point shows the percent rank of a given lead time value.

targets.rawSql:
with _ranks as(
  select
    round(COALESCE(i.lead_time_minutes, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, i.created_date, i.resolution_date))/1440) as lead_time_day,
    percent_rank() over (order by round(COALESCE(i.lead_time_minutes, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, i.created_date, i.resolution_date))/1440) asc) as pr
  from issues i
    join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
  where
    COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) in (${plane_type})
    and i.status = 'DONE'
    and $__timeFilter(i.resolution_date)
    and bi.board_id in (${plane_board_id})
)

select
  lpad(concat(lead_time_day,'d'), 4, ' ') as "Day",
  max(pr) as "CDF"
from _ranks
group by lead_time_day
order by lead_time_day asc

panels.title: Cumulative Distribution of Lead Time [Resolved in Selected Time Range]
3. Estimate Points

panels.description: Total story points for all user stories in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql:
select
  sum(wi.estimate_point) as value
from _tool_plane_work_items wi
  join board_issues bi on bi.issue_id = concat('plane:PlaneWorkItem:', wi.connection_id, ':', wi.project_id, ':', wi.work_item_id)
  join issues i on i.id = bi.issue_id
where
  COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) in (${plane_type})
  and bi.board_id in (${plane_board_id})

panels.title: Total Estimate Points

panels.description: Total story points for closed/completed user stories.

targets.rawSql:
select
  sum(wi.estimate_point) as value
from _tool_plane_work_items wi
  join board_issues bi on bi.issue_id = concat('plane:PlaneWorkItem:', wi.connection_id, ':', wi.project_id, ':', wi.work_item_id)
  join issues i on i.id = bi.issue_id
where
  COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) in (${plane_type})
  and bi.board_id in (${plane_board_id})
  and i.status = 'DONE'

panels.title: Completed Estimate Points

panels.description: Estimate points allocated to each Plane cycle. Work items without a cycle appear in the No Cycle bucket.

targets.rawSql:
select
  COALESCE(c.name, 'No Cycle') as Cycle,
  sum(wi.estimate_point) as `Estimate Points`
from _tool_plane_work_items wi
  join issues i on i.id = concat('plane:PlaneWorkItem:', wi.connection_id, ':', wi.project_id, ':', wi.work_item_id)
  left join _tool_plane_cycle_items ci
    on ci.connection_id = wi.connection_id
   and ci.project_id = wi.project_id
   and ci.item_id = wi.work_item_id
   and ci.item_type = 'work_item'
  left join _tool_plane_cycles c
    on c.connection_id = wi.connection_id
   and c.project_id = wi.project_id
   and c.cycle_id = COALESCE(ci.cycle_id, NULLIF(wi.cycle_id, ''))
where
  COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) in (${plane_type})
  and concat('plane:PlaneProject:', wi.connection_id, ':', wi.project_id) in (${plane_board_id})
group by 1
order by `Estimate Points` desc

panels.title: Estimate Points by Cycle

panels.description: Story points distributed across assignees.

targets.rawSql:
select
  COALESCE(NULLIF(i.assignee_name,''), NULLIF(i.assignee_id,''), 'Unassigned') as Assignee,
  sum(wi.estimate_point) as `Estimate Points`
from _tool_plane_work_items wi
  join issues i on i.id = concat('plane:PlaneWorkItem:', wi.connection_id, ':', wi.project_id, ':', wi.work_item_id)
  join board_issues bi on bi.issue_id = i.id
where
  COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) in (${plane_type})
  and $__timeFilter(i.created_date)
  and bi.board_id in (${plane_board_id})
group by 1
order by `Estimate Points` desc

panels.title: Estimate Points by Assignee [Created in Selected Time Range]

panels.description: Compares estimated points in completed, in-progress, and not-started work items on the selected Plane board. Cancelled items are excluded.

targets.rawSql:
select
  now() as time,
  coalesce(sum(case when i.status = 'DONE' then wi.estimate_point else 0 end), 0) as 'Completed',
  coalesce(sum(case when i.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' then wi.estimate_point else 0 end), 0) as 'In Progress',
  coalesce(sum(case when i.status not in ('DONE', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'CANCELLED') then wi.estimate_point else 0 end), 0) as 'Not Started'
from _tool_plane_work_items wi
  join board_issues bi on bi.issue_id = concat('plane:PlaneWorkItem:', wi.connection_id, ':', wi.project_id, ':', wi.work_item_id)
  join issues i on i.id = bi.issue_id
where
  COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) in (${plane_type})
  and bi.board_id in (${plane_board_id})

panels.title: Estimate Points: Completed vs In Progress vs Not Started
4. Issues Overview

panels.description: Breakdown of all Plane issues by their current normalized status.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  now() as time,
  count(distinct case when i.status = 'TODO' then i.id end) as 'To Do',
  count(distinct case when i.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' then i.id end) as 'In Progress',
  count(distinct case when i.status = 'DONE' then i.id end) as 'Done',
  count(distinct case when i.status = 'CANCELLED' then i.id end) as 'Cancelled',
  count(distinct case when i.status not in ('TODO','IN_PROGRESS','DONE','CANCELLED') then i.id end) as 'Other'
FROM issues i
  join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
WHERE
  COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) in (${plane_type})
  and bi.board_id in (${plane_board_id})

panels.title: Issues by Status

panels.description: Number of user stories assigned to each team member.

targets.rawSql:
select
  COALESCE(NULLIF(i.assignee_name,''), NULLIF(i.assignee_id,''), 'Unassigned') as Assignee,
  count(distinct i.id) as `Issues`
from issues i
  join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
where
  COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) in (${plane_type})
  and $__timeFilter(i.created_date)
  and bi.board_id in (${plane_board_id})
group by 1
order by `Issues` desc

panels.title: Issues by Assignee [Created in Selected Time Range]

panels.description: Number of work items in each Plane cycle, including a No Cycle bucket for unassigned work items.

targets.rawSql:
select
  COALESCE(c.name, 'No Cycle') as Cycle,
  count(distinct wi.work_item_id) as `Work Items`
from _tool_plane_work_items wi
  join issues i on i.id = concat('plane:PlaneWorkItem:', wi.connection_id, ':', wi.project_id, ':', wi.work_item_id)
  left join _tool_plane_cycle_items ci
    on ci.connection_id = wi.connection_id
   and ci.project_id = wi.project_id
   and ci.item_id = wi.work_item_id
   and ci.item_type = 'work_item'
  left join _tool_plane_cycles c
    on c.connection_id = wi.connection_id
   and c.project_id = wi.project_id
   and c.cycle_id = COALESCE(ci.cycle_id, NULLIF(wi.cycle_id, ''))
where
  COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) in (${plane_type})
  and concat('plane:PlaneProject:', wi.connection_id, ':', wi.project_id) in (${plane_board_id})
group by 1
order by `Work Items` desc

panels.title: Work Items per Cycle

panels.description: Milestone progress: open vs. closed user stories per sprint.

targets.rawSql:
select
  COALESCE(c.name, 'No Cycle') as Cycle,
  count(distinct case when i.status not in ('DONE', 'CANCELLED') then wi.work_item_id else null end) as `Open Work Items`,
  count(distinct case when i.status = 'DONE' then wi.work_item_id else null end) as `Closed Work Items`
from _tool_plane_work_items wi
  left join _tool_plane_cycle_items ci
    on ci.connection_id = wi.connection_id
   and ci.project_id = wi.project_id
   and ci.item_id = wi.work_item_id
   and ci.item_type = 'work_item'
  left join _tool_plane_cycles c
    on c.connection_id = wi.connection_id
   and c.project_id = wi.project_id
   and c.cycle_id = COALESCE(ci.cycle_id, NULLIF(wi.cycle_id, ''))
  join issues i on i.id = concat('plane:PlaneWorkItem:', wi.connection_id, ':', wi.project_id, ':', wi.work_item_id)
where
  COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) in (${plane_type})
  and concat('plane:PlaneProject:', wi.connection_id, ':', wi.project_id) in (${plane_board_id})
group by 1
order by `Closed Work Items` desc

panels.title: Cycle Progress: Open vs. Closed Work Items

options.content: This dashboard is created based on this [data schema](https://devlake.apache.org/docs/DataModels/DevLakeDomainLayerSchema). Want to add more metrics? Please follow the [guide](https://devlake.apache.org/docs/Configuration/Dashboards/GrafanaUserGuide).

panels.title: 5. Issue Type Breakdown

panels.description: Distribution of all Plane items across their original or normalized issue types.

targets.rawSql:
select
  COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) as `Issue Type`,
  count(distinct i.id) as `Issues`
from issues i
  join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
where bi.board_id in (${plane_board_id})
group by 1
order by `Issues` desc

panels.title: Issues by Type

panels.description: Open vs closed count for each Plane issue type in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql:
select
  COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) as `Issue Type`,
  count(distinct case when i.status not in ('DONE', 'CANCELLED') then i.id else null end) as `Open`,
  count(distinct case when i.status = 'DONE' then i.id else null end) as `Closed`
from issues i
  join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
where
  $__timeFilter(i.created_date)
  and bi.board_id in (${plane_board_id})
group by 1
order by 1

panels.title: Open vs Closed by Type [Created in Selected Time Range]

panels.description: Monthly count of Plane items created, broken down by issue type.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_ADD(date(i.created_date), INTERVAL -DAYOFMONTH(date(i.created_date))+1 DAY) as time,
  COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) as metric,
  count(distinct i.id) as value
FROM issues i
  join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
WHERE
  bi.board_id in (${plane_board_id})
  AND $__timeFilter(i.created_date)
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.title: Items Created per Month by Type

panels.description: Average lead time in days from creation to resolution, broken down by issue type (resolved issues only).

targets.rawSql:
select
  COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) as `Issue Type`,
  round(avg(
    COALESCE(i.lead_time_minutes, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, i.created_date, i.resolution_date))
  /1440), 1) as `Avg Lead Time (days)`
from issues i
  join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
where
  i.status = 'DONE'
  and bi.board_id in (${plane_board_id})
group by 1
having `Avg Lead Time (days)` is not null
order by 2 desc

panels.title: Average Lead Time by Type

list.definition: select concat(name, '--', id) from boards where id like 'plane:PlaneProject:%'
list.label: Choose Project
list.name: plane_board_id
list.query: select concat(name, '--', id) from boards where id like 'plane:PlaneProject:%'

list.definition: select distinct COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) from issues i join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id where bi.board_id like 'plane:PlaneProject:%' order by 1
list.label: Issue Type
list.name: plane_type
list.query: select distinct COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) from issues i join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id where bi.board_id like 'plane:PlaneProject:%' order by 1
